---
title: ""
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:youremail@domain.edu"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: "https://github.com/your-username"
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/your-profile"
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_ID"
    - icon: person-badge
      text: ORCID
      href: "https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000"
---

::: {.about-entity}
## Your Name

PhD Candidate in Data Science and Economics. I work on causal inference, applied machine learning, and public-interest data products.

<div class="home-buttons">
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="cv.qmd">CV</a>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="projects.qmd">Projects</a>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="public-goods.qmd">Public Goods</a>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="blogs.qmd">Blogs</a>
</div>
:::

::: {.updates-box}
### Updates

- **Mar 2026** • Presented paper at Midwest Econometrics Group Meeting.
- **Feb 2026** • Teaching Assistant for *Applied Regression and Causal Inference*.
- **Jan 2026** • Published reproducible policy dashboard in Public Goods.
- **Nov 2025** • Released open-source package for panel-data workflows.
:::
